titleStmt.title: SII 37.184: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 184. (A.R. No. B 68 of 1939-40.) Virūru, Siddhavatam Taluk, Cuddapah District.

summary.p: Broken slab lying near the image of Vīrabhadra.
This is dated Śaka 1446, Sarvajit, Vaiśākha ba. 15, Monday. Irregular.

It records the grant of their incomes by Sarasvati Mādhavarāju, Taligala Tirumalarāju, Kūtari Tirumalayya Govindayya etc., at the instance of the twenty four families of their community to a person named Bōḍi Liṅgayya for worship of Mahāliṅga Vīrēśvara, Perumāḷu, Akkaladēvi and other deities of Vīrūru and for offering food to the local people (suradēsis i.e., svadeśis) as well as outsiders (paradēśis). The grant was made in the presence of the assembly of the members of the Ayyāvaḷi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Avighnamastu
svasti śrī vijayābhyuda
ya śālivāhana śakavarṣaṁbbu
lu 1446 Agunēṁṭi sarvajitu
saṁvvatsara vaiśākha ba 15 sō ta
ma yiruvai nālugu kulālavā
ri Ānatini sarasvati mādhavarāju
nu taligaḷa tirumalarājuṁnu kū
tari tirumalayya gōviṁdayaṁgā
ruṁnnu mōdalaina tama yiruvai nālugu
kulālavāruṁnnu bōḍiliṁgayaku yicina
dharmaśāsanaṁ . virūni mahā mahā liṁgamukuṁnu
vīrēśvarunikiṁnni berumāḷakuṁnnu yakkaladēviki
nni mōdalaina grāmadaivālaku patra puṣpaṁ veṭi gā
nu tōṁṭaveṭidēvuḷālaku patra puṣpaṁ peṭṭē Aṁdukuṁ
nnu suradēśi paradēśiki mīlōḍaṭlu Aṁnadānaṁ
peṭē Aṁdukuṁnu Āgrāma Ayyāvaḷi mukhya
maina cālumūla samasta pekaṁḍra muṁdarānu
nirnayaṁ peṭi sāgiṁcina vivaraṁ sakali śīmalōni virū
rigrāmaṁ tama yiruvai nālugu kulālavārikiṁnni vu

ci vētana Aṁta
la vārikiṁ buṇyaṁgā
pūrvakamugānu dāravōsi
mu yiruvayi nālagu kulālavā
nu puṇyaṁgānu dāravōsi yistimi
śāsanaṁlōni puṇyaṁyī
dēreṭaṭugā puṇyānku yavva
ru tappiraina tappinānu gaṁ
kata gōvu brā pāpāna bōvuvāru
vāraṇāśilōnu ta goḍukunu caṁpuvāru
vāna ja tānu pāpāna pōvuvā
ru Āpāpānakulōnugāka yī puṇyāna daṁlōnu
Ā caṁdrārkka sthāIgānu sāgiṁcedi celiṁpu
yīḍērēṭaṭugānu nirnayīḍērci mā yiruvainālu
gu kulālavāriki vacce vartana Anubhaviṁci sukhānavuṁḍedi
śrī śrī jēyunu . svadattā dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānupā
lanaṁ paradatāpahārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣpalaṁ bha
vēt . 0 Ñ yī puṇyānaku yavvaru tappinā
nu mā yiruvainālgu kulāla vāriki veli ga
naka yī puṇyanaku lōnai naḍacedi
Digital edition of SII 37.184 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
